title: Dheeran Adhyayam Onnu
subTitle: A police officer is assigned the task of solving the mystery behind a series of murders. Upon thoroughly investigating, he discovers a common thread that binds all the murders together.

title: Kumki
subTitle: Bomman, a mahout, and his elephant are assigned to protect the crops of a hill tribe from a rogue elephant. However, his life takes a turn when he falls in love with the village leader's daughter.

title: Chiriyo Chiri
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of the funniest and most entertaining comedy scenes and videos from various famous Malayalam movies.

title: Thuppakki
subTitle: An army officer sets out to save the people of his country when he learns that an entire network of terrorists are operating in the city and are planning to carry out multiple terror attacks.

title: Doctor's Talk
subTitle: Dr.Eeppan, the host, interacts and discusses about various health problems with guest doctors and gives remedial tips for the viewers.

title: Sooryavamsi
subTitle: The head of India's Anti-Terrorism Squad, Sooryavanshi, fights against all odds to take down a deadly terrorist group tied to his past.

title: Anjaan
subTitle: Krishna travels to Mumbai to look for his missing brother Raju. However, things take a turn when learns that Raju was a notorious gangster in the city.

title: Vivegam
subTitle: Ajay Kumar, a former counter-terrorism agent, is called for a special mission. However, he is betrayed by his friends and is accused of extremely treasonous acts.

title: The Legend of Loulan
subTitle: When young archaeologist Wu Tian finds a mirror from the Loulan civilisation, he goes on a mission to protect the treasure of the civilisation and uncover the secrets of the mysterious Ghost Army.

title: Thuruppugulan
subTitle: Menon buys land for his five-star hotel and asks his trusted employee, Sreedharan Unnithan, to take its charge. Years later, Unnithan gets Menon imprisoned in a fake case and Kunjumon helps him.

title: Thalainagaram 2
subTitle: Right, a former gangster, swears off violence to become a real estate agent. However, he is forced to return to his old ways when three criminals try to frame him for a crime.

title: Sooryavamsi
subTitle: The head of India's Anti-Terrorism Squad, Sooryavanshi, fights against all odds to take down a deadly terrorist group tied to his past.

title: Cobra
subTitle: A genius mathematician uses his skills to assassinate his targets and stay clear of law enforcement. However, a vigilante secretly tracks his movements, vying for revenge.

title: Radhakrishna
subTitle: When the forest department takes away the elephant, the child is left without his dearest friend. The young boy undertakes a journey to find the lost animal.

title: Magic Oven
subTitle: A renowned chef shares and demonstrates the method to prepare various delicious recipes that can be easily made at home.

title: Janatha Garage
subTitle: When Anand visits Hyderabad, he encounters Sathyam, who operates an organisation aiding the underprivileged. Sathyam, swayed by Anand's vision, hands over the organisation's management to him.

title: Mutant Tiger
subTitle: In order to gain eternal youth, a eunuch dabbles in tiger essence. Trouble ensues when his experiment goes awry, causing mutated tigers to attack the city.

title: Saamy 2
subTitle: Ramasamy, who works as a front-end receptionist for Union Minister Viswanathan, decides to pursue civil service. Soon, Viswanathan's daughter falls in love with him after he saves her from gangsters.

title: Miruthan
subTitle: An intoxicated dog bites a security guard, unleashes a zombie outbreak. A traffic officer takes up the responsibility to find the antidote.

title: Cobra
subTitle: A genius mathematician uses his skills to assassinate his targets and stay clear of law enforcement. However, a vigilante secretly tracks his movements, vying for revenge.

title: USA Weekly News
subTitle: The host presents the latest social and economic news stories about the Malayali diaspora in the USA, along with updates on various cultural events and interviews.

title: Bharathchandran I.P.S.
subTitle: Hyder Ali Hassan, a scheming politician, is in league with the underworld and runs a lot of illegal businesses. Balachandran, an IPS officer, is sent on a mission to capture him.

title: Veeram
subTitle: Two brothers, raised by their sister, take opposite path, one honest, the other criminal. When tragedy strikes and the criminal brother dies, the honest one seeks vengeance.

title: Comali
subTitle: A long coma leaves Ravi disorientated in an unrecognisable world. However, he sets out on a journey to reclaim his past and adapt to a new reality.

title: Water Monster
subTitle: A man and the villagers must fight against the water monster who returns and wreaks havoc in the village.

title: Jilla
subTitle: Shakthi, the adopted son of Sivan, is a powerful gangster in Madurai. Although Shakthi bitterly hates the police, he is forced to become a policeman at his father's behest.

title: Kabali
subTitle: A man spends 25 years in prison for fighting against oppression. Old but still bloodthirsty, he decides to seek revenge against his enemies upon his release.
